synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0921 Important: Oracle Linux 8 go-toolset:rhel8 security update
description:
delve
[1.25.2-1.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

[1.25.2-1]
- Update to Delve 1.25.2 (Sync from CentOS Stream 9)
- Related: RHEL-121223

golang
[1.25.5-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.5 (fips-1)
- Resolves: RHEL-139365
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0921

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0921.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:
